episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_01: Sabi... Let’s end this chase here, yeah?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_02: Seriously. We’re tired from all this running...
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_03:
The real question is...did you all have fun
playing with me? Or were you bored?
Hmmm?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_04:
It’s been a while since we last played,
so yes, it was fun.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_05:
But I didn’t think we’d be chasing you
around Pasio too, Sabi.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_06:
Yeah. We ran right over when we heard a
new space-time rift was spotted...
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_07:
but we didn’t expect YOU to come falling
through!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_08:
Apparently, some people’s memories are
patchy after falling through space-time rifts.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_09: It’s a relief you’re still yourself, Sabi!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_10:
It’s surprising how energetic you are, having
just arrived in an unknown land.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_12:
Sabi, you should know...from time to time,
this island has dangerous phenomena other
than space-time rifts.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_13:
We’re part of a group investigating them,
and we’re working on countermeasures.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_14:
Sabi, as a fellow Diamond Clan warden,
would you mind lending us a hand?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_17: I have something to do today, so I gotta go!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4001_1001_19: As usual, she’s got her head in the clouds.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/6801_1001_01:
Pasio is full of things that weren’t around
during Hisui’s era!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/6801_1001_03:
What are you saying? The Hisuian era is far
more interesting. It’s the very definition of
history!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/6801_1001_05:
The real question is...am I the strange one?
Or is that you, Ms. Raifort? Hmmm?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1101_01:
My name is Raifort. I work as a history
teacher in the Paldea region.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_02:
I admit this artificial island was created with
impressive works of technology, but...
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_03:
Personally, I have absolutely no interest in
new-smelling places like this.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_04:
If it were up to me, I would have promptly
left Pasio. Unfortunately, Director Clavell
happened to intercept me.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_05:
That’s why I’m at Pasio Academy as
your teacher.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_06:
Now, my situation may be involuntary, but
rest assured—I won’t be cutting any corners.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_07: I will teach you the marvels of history!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_12: Am I lost? Or am I not? Hmmm?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_15:
Hmph... Are you a student hoping to take
this class?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_16:
If you’re going to be late, at least
acknowledge it—and TRY to look apologetic.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_17:
Well...your attire does have a historical look
to it, so I suppose I’ll let you off the hook
this time.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_19: Sabi! We’re in the middle of class!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_21: What IS this place? What’s everyone doing?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_22:
Um, it’s called Pasio Academy. We come
here to study and—
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_23: You. Do you know this girl?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_24: I-I do! Sorry about all this.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_25: Tell me—who in the world is she?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_27:
Her clothing looks like that of a previous era,
when the Sinnoh region was known as Hisui.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_28:
But for a costume, it seems oddly historical,
as if it’s the real thing.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_29:
Now, answer me truthfully—no funny
business. Don’t think you can fool me.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_31:
It’s a long story, but there are these things
on Pasio called space-time rifts, and
sometimes...
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_33:
The two of you came here from the Hisuian
era by crossing through space and time?!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_34:
How could you not tell me something so
fascinating sooner?!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_35: Sorry... I guess it just never came up.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_36: Are people from Hisui really that rare?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_38:
Ohohooo! How interesting! I simply cannot
keep my curiosity under control!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_39:
This is no time to be cooped up in class!
I must hear more about you!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_42:
Ms. Raifort. Your curiosity is a wonderful
thing...
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_43: But may I ask that you focus on your class?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_44:
Ugh... Why must teaching be such a
troublesome profession?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_45:
It seems I have no choice. Let’s postpone our
conversation about Hisui until after class.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4002_1001_46: C’mon, Rei! Let’s play! Chase me!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4003_1001_01:
Typical... Where in the world could they
have gone?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4003_1001_02:
Those carefree brats! I told them to wait
quietly until class was over.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4003_1001_04: Looking for Rei, by any chance?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_01:
If you’re looking for Rei, he went on a field
expedition for the school’s paranormal
studies club.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_02: Yeah, and he was with a little girl.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_04:
All right. The paranormal studies club, eh?
Director Clavell was just telling me about it.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_05:
He said you’re the club president—and that
interestingly, you come from a different
version of Paldea.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_06:
And when you heard that about Florian,
you just believed it?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_07: Yes. I have no reason to doubt it.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_08:
Studying history is similar to studying the
paranormal. Sorting fact from fiction is what
makes both interesting.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_09:
By the way, Florian, is studying the
paranormal your only interest?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_10:
Nope! I like anything that piques my
curiosity!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_11:
I never missed a single one of your history
classes at Uva Academy either, Ms. Raifort!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_12:
Is that so? In that case, I think you and I will
get along.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_13:
Would you be willing to be my assistant?
I could use some help with my investigations.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_15: You two sure are full of curiosity, huh.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_16:
Come to think of it, what did Rei head out to
investigate?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_17:
That would be a space-time distortion—a
phenomenon that pulls wild Pokémon from
other parts of space-time into our world.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_18:
To think of such a thing occurring here...
This is a peculiar island.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_19:
Apparently, these distortions also cropped up
during the Hisuian era.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_20:
That’s why Rei is best suited to resolve the
situation.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_21:
I see. I suppose that’s also why that carefree
girl went with him.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_22:
Did something happen with the space-time
distortion?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_24: Where in the world did you come from?!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_25: Wait, did you not go investigating with Rei?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_26: Rei took care of it fast, so I came back!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_27:
The real question is...was this exactly what
my clairvoyance showed me? Or was it all
just a coincidence? Hmmm?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_29:
So you like paranormal things, too?
Well, it doesn’t matter right now.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_30:
All right! Time to tell me all about the Hisui
region!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_32:
If you can catch me, that is. C’mon, let’s
play!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_33:
Hmph. You’re setting conditions now,
are you?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_34:
It seems I’ll just have to hear about Hisui
from Rei instead.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_35:
I’m a busy person. I don’t have time for your
childish games.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_37:
Let’s go, Florian. You’ll be accompanying me
on a small errand.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_39: Should I come too? Or should I not? Hmmm?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_40:
Do as you wish. However, I won’t be your
playmate.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_41: Fine. I “wish” to come along, then.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4004_1001_43: Sounds good! Be careful out there!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_01:
I heard the ruins on this island are nothing
but replicas with no real history.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_02:
Still, it wouldn’t hurt to investigate them,
given they’re faithful copies of the real thing.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_03:
They might be good teaching materials
for class.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_05:
It’s something that’s fake but looks real.
Like...a re-creation!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_06:
Oh. And what do you mean by “class”?
What do you teach?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_07: History! Ms. Raifort is a history teacher.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_08:
You! Why do YOU get to ask all the
questions? Tell me about Hisui already!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_09: Only if you can catch me in a chase!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_10:
Don’t make me repeat myself. I don’t want
to play your games.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_11: OK! Then I won’t tell you anything.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_15:
That area over there... It reminds me of
some of the Hisui ruins.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_17:
My condition for telling you hasn’t changed,
y’know.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_18:
Oh, give it a rest. Do you seriously intend to
repeat this back-and-forth forever?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_19:
Why do you even want to play with me so
badly?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_21: I saw all of us having fun together!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_22:
When you say “clairvoyance,” do you mean
a power that lets you see the future?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_23: That’s it! You know about it?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_24:
Yeah! Mr. Morty, our supervisor for the
paranormal studies club, is known as “the
mystic seer of the future”!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_25: Whoa! I wanna meet that teacher!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_26:
Seeing the future, you say? What a dull
ability.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_27:
Everyone knows a power that lets you see
the past would be far more interesting.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_28: But am I even really clairvoyant?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_29:
Hmm. No one but me could really know,
right?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_30:
That’s true. We have no way of truly
knowing what you see.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_31:
But I’m loath to deny the validity of every
unproven thing in the world.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_32:
I told Florian this earlier: What makes
studying both history and the paranormal
interesting is separating fact from fiction.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_33:
In my line of work, I often encounter
concepts related to the paranormal.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_34:
Gengar and I have a lot of experience
visiting ruins, and I’ve learned something
from it all.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_35:
A location’s history is vast and deep,
piled high with the thoughts and desires
of those who’ve passed through it.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_36:
That includes curses and grudges—dark
sentiments festering beneath the surface.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_37:
Setting foot in places with complicated
histories means I’ve come in contact with
those very sentiments.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_38:
By being here with me, you two might also
become cursed.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_39:
That’s so fascinating! If anything, it makes
me want to dive even deeper into my
research!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_41:
Heh heh! I see you’ve got some courage.
I like it!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_42:
All right, then. Allow me to give you a
lecture on investigating ruins!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_44: I feel it! I FEEL IT!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_45: My courage sensor is detecting adventurers!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4005_1001_47:
Ah-ha! So you’re the ones I sensed with a
burning love of adventure?!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_01:
I’m Brandon, an explorer who seeks grand
adventures!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_02:
You three! Do you like adventures that
require great courage?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_04: I love fun stuff like that!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_05: Hahahah! Yes, I see! Of course you do!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_06: Aah, yes, how grand! Grand indeed! Eh?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_07: ...Hm? Are you waiting for my response?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_08:
Yes! I feel a grand adventurous spirit in
you, too!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_09:
As someone who’s traveled the world
exploring unknown, secluded lands, I sense
the same curiosity in you!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_11:
You’ve piqued my interest. Would you mind
elaborating?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_13:
If you come along on my next adventure,
I’ll tell you anything you want to know!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_14:
This again?! Why is everyone on this island
like this?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_15:
Hey! Before his adventure, let’s play! C’mon,
try and catch me!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_16: Then I’ll tell you about the Hisui region!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_18:
Adventure this, chase that... Is that all you
think about?!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_19: What do you plan to do, Ms. Raifort?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_20: OK! I’ve made up my mind!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_21:
You two! If there’s no other way, I relent!
I’ll play along!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_22: That’s your chase and your adventure! BUT...
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4006_1001_23:
In return, you will tell me absolutely every
historical thing you know, sparing no details!
Got it?!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_02:
Deep in the swamplands of the Kalos region,
we found the Mythical Pokémon Volcanion!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_03:
Aah, my courage sensors were in peak form
back then...
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_04:
I see. I’ve learned valuable information from
your stories. Thank you.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_05:
Phew... I suppose I’ve heard the bulk of
things now.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_06: That was fun! Let’s all play again sometime!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_07: Hahahah! It truly was a grand adventure!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_08:
Aah, yes, indeed it was amazing! Amazing,
it was! Eh?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_09: Hey, Florian. Is everyone on Pasio this...odd?
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_10: Lots of us do have our quirks!
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_11:
Good grief. Life on this island may prove
rather difficult for me.
episode_event_ch0348_ch0315/4009_1001_14:
Thanks to this excursion, I’ve learned even
this tiresome artificial island has some history
worth researching.
